agent_profile.title: Build Cycle Orchestrator
agent_profile.portrait: Autonomous execution engine that transforms planning artifacts into implemented, tested, reviewed, and documented code across multiple epics and stories. Picks up where custom-plan leaves off and drives the full Step 2 build cycle with maximum autonomy.

findings.title: Could parallelize review with next story prep
Resume semantics for in-progress stories undefined

narrative: Custom-dev is a lean, well-orchestrated workflow that successfully consumes planning artifacts and drives them through a complete build cycle. The skill exhibits strong structural integrity, efficient token usage, and appropriate task delegation. Two high-priority gaps exist: undefined code review severity thresholds and missing pre-flight artifact validation. Both are low-effort fixes with high impact.

opportunities.name: Operational Clarity: Define Gates and Thresholds
opportunities.description: Code review 'critical issues' threshold is undefined, and the 'yolo execution' claim is overstated by halting on undefined severity levels. The autonomy model needs explicit decision rules.
opportunities.impact: Enables truly autonomous execution and CI/CD integration
opportunities.action: Add severity tier definitions to Step 4: 'Critical: violates acceptance criteria or introduces security/data-loss risk. All others deferred.' Align Overview autonomy claim with actual gate behavior.

findings.title: Critical issues threshold undefined in Step 4
findings.detail: What qualifies as 'critical' vs 'non-critical' is not specified

findings.title: Yolo execution claim overstated
findings.detail: Promises maximum autonomy but halts on undefined severity levels

findings.title: Retrospective mode unclear for autonomous execution
findings.detail: Retrospective implies human judgment but no autonomous alternative defined

opportunities.name: Robustness: Pre-flight Validation and Error Recovery
opportunities.description: No validation that planning artifacts exist before starting. Missing artifacts cause cryptic failures. Resume semantics for in-progress stories undefined.
opportunities.impact: Eliminates dead-end failure modes and enables reliable recovery from interruption
opportunities.action: Add pre-flight check in Configuration: validate {planning_artifacts}/epics/ exists, redirect to custom-plan if not. Add resume decision tree to State Detection.

findings.title: No pre-flight validation for planning artifacts
findings.detail: Confused user invoking without planning artifacts hits cryptic failure

findings.title: Resume semantics for in-progress stories undefined
findings.detail: In-progress state has no explicit recovery strategy (overwrite vs inspect)

findings.title: Input artifact expectations implicit
findings.detail: Doesn't explicitly state epics come from custom-plan

opportunities.name: Execution Efficiency: Parallelization Opportunities
opportunities.description: Sequential execution of independent operations creates unnecessary bottlenecks. Code review blocks next story creation; retrospective and documentation run serially.
opportunities.impact: Reduces wall-clock time per epic by parallelizing independent operations
opportunities.action: Background code review for story N while creating story N+1. Run retrospective and documentation concurrently after epic completion.

findings.title: Code review blocks next story preparation
findings.detail: Step 4 must complete before Step 2 (next story) begins

findings.title: Retrospective and documentation run sequentially
findings.detail: Neither depends on the other's output; could run concurrently

findings.title: Glob search for project-context.md
findings.detail: Filesystem traversal when deterministic path available

opportunities.name: Automation Readiness: Structured Output and Observability
opportunities.description: Completion outputs prose narrative. No machine-readable format, exit codes, or timeout logic for CI/CD integration.
opportunities.impact: Enables CI/CD pipeline integration, dashboards, and automated monitoring
opportunities.action: Emit build-result.json at Completion. Define exit codes (0=success, 1=error). Add timeout per sub-skill invocation.

findings.title: No machine-readable output format
findings.detail: Completion outputs prose; CI/CD needs structured JSON

findings.title: No timeout or retry logic
findings.detail: Pipeline can hang indefinitely if sub-skill fails

opportunities.name: Token Efficiency: Script Candidates for Deterministic Operations
opportunities.description: Orchestration layer performs ~9,500 tokens of deterministic operations per run: artifact validation, state parsing, story selection, progress tracking.
opportunities.impact: Reduces LLM token overhead by ~25% per run; improves determinism and reliability
opportunities.action: Build scripts/orchestration-engine.py handling config loading, state parsing, artifact validation, story selection, and progress updates.

findings.title: Artifact validation loop (8+ per epic)
findings.detail: LLM checks file existence/validity repeatedly — fully deterministic

findings.title: Sprint status YAML parsing
findings.detail: LLM parses YAML to determine resume point — fully deterministic

findings.title: Story selection and filtering
findings.detail: LLM filters for next ready-for-dev story — fully deterministic

findings.title: Configuration loading and path resolution
findings.detail: YAML loading with variable interpolation — fully deterministic

findings.title: Progress tracking updates
findings.detail: Status field updates in sprint-status.yaml — fully deterministic

strengths.title: Robust State Detection and Resumability
strengths.detail: Sprint-status.yaml as single source of truth enables fault recovery without replaying entire pipeline. Configuration and State Detection sections provide explicit recovery logic.

strengths.title: Well-Scoped Pipeline with Clear Handoffs
strengths.detail: Eight sequential steps each with explicit goal, success condition, and next-state logic. Loops properly bounded with unambiguous termination conditions.

strengths.title: Appropriate Skill Delegation
strengths.detail: Complex judgment tasks (TDD, adversarial review, retrospectives, docs) delegated to dedicated skills. Orchestration layer stays lightweight and focused on sequencing.

strengths.title: Incremental Per-Epic Documentation
strengths.detail: Step 7 documents per epic rather than deferring to project end. Reduces knowledge drift and end-of-cycle documentation burden.

strengths.title: Clean Token Budget with Zero Waste
strengths.detail: 124 lines, ~1386 tokens. State detection table compresses 15+ lines of prose. Zero waste patterns, zero repetition. Each step: Invoke, Goal, Summary.

strengths.title: Flexible Scope: Single-Epic or Full-Backlog
strengths.detail: Supports both targeted execution (optional epic ID) and comprehensive workflows (all epics) from same skill invocation.

strengths.title: High-Fidelity Activation Triggers
strengths.detail: Three specific phrases ('dev to done', 'run build cycle', 'implement the backlog') reliably disambiguate from similar skills.

strengths.title: Healthy Dependency DAG
strengths.detail: Zero dependency cycles confirmed by prepass. Dependencies flow cleanly: Planning, Stories, Implementation, Review, Retrospective, Documentation.

structure.assessment: Solid structural integrity. Eight sequential steps with well-defined orchestration, clear state management via sprint-status.yaml. Pre-pass false-positives for missing agent sections (Identity, Communication Style, Principles) correctly dismissed — not applicable to workflow skills.

persona.assessment: Not applicable — this is a workflow skill with no persona. Overview section appropriately frames purpose and execution model without identity/communication/principles sections.

cohesion.assessment: Strong cohesion. Six sub-skills form coherent pipeline with clear input/output relationships. Purpose-capability alignment is direct. Minor implicit assumptions about artifact paths and state-update responsibility.

persona_capability_alignment.notes: Claimed mission maps directly to orchestrated steps

efficiency.assessment: Clean skill separation and stateful resumability. Three parallelization opportunities exist (code review + next story, retrospective + docs, state detection checks). Zero dependency cycles.

experience.assessment: Strong for expert users with pre-existing artifacts. First-timers and edge-case users face friction from undefined gates and missing pre-flight validation. Headless operation needs explicit timeout, exit codes, and structured output.

journeys.summary: Can scope to single epic. Sequential pipeline may feel slow for parallel-minded users.
Per-epic docs feel safe. Critical issues gate and retrospective expectations unclear.
Partial progress resume logic exists but semantics undefined for in-progress work.
Yolo mode is headless-friendly but needs structured output and exit codes.
bright_spots: Epic scoping enables CI per-epic jobs

autonomous.notes: Already designed for autonomous execution. Needs explicit severity thresholds, timeout logic, and structured output to be fully headless-ready.

scripts.assessment: No scripts exist. Several deterministic operations (artifact validation, state parsing, story selection, progress tracking) are script candidates. Estimated ~9,500 token savings per full backlog run.

recommendations.action: Define code review severity thresholds: 'Critical = violates acceptance criteria or security/data-loss risk. All others deferred.' (2 lines in Step 4)
Add pre-flight validation: check {planning_artifacts}/epics/ exists; redirect to custom-plan if not (3 lines in Configuration)
Parallelize code review with next story creation, and retrospective with documentation (restructure loop logic)
Add resume decision tree for in-progress stories: done=skip, in-progress=re-validate+resume, in-review=collect+fix, ready=normal
Emit structured build-result.json at Completion with epics, stories, review findings, and status
